pi_items.source: Derived from task instructions '~/Projects/10h_day_project.xml' and standard Linux home directory mapping (~/ maps to /home/ga/).
Derived from the instruction to set 'Hours per day to 10.00' (10 * 60 = 600) and verified by inspecting the Microsoft Project XML schema element MinutesPerDay.
Derived from the instruction to set 'Hours per week is set to 40.00' (40 * 60 = 2400) and verified by inspecting the Microsoft Project XML schema element MinutesPerWeek.
Verified by parsing /workspace/assets/sample_project.xml which contains 146 <Task> elements. 10 is a safe minimum threshold used for anti-gaming verification.

privileged_info_summary: The target save path is correctly derived from the prompt as /home/ga/Projects/10h_day_project.xml. The requested 10 hours per day translates correctly to 600 minutes in the ProjectLibre (MSPDI) XML schema for MinutesPerDay, and 40 hours per week translates to 2400 MinutesPerWeek. The original sample project contains 146 tasks, which confirms that a minimum task count threshold of 10 used for anti-gaming verification is a safe lower bound.
